title: Product Recall Notice
text:
## Product Recall Notice

Attention customers: the {adjective} {object} sold last {day of week} may unexpectedly {verb}.

Reports include {number} cases of {plural noun}, one {color} smoke cloud, and a {animal} becoming {emotion}.

Do not place the item near {food}, your {body part}, or any active {vehicle}.

To request a refund, mail the {noun} to {place} while {verb ending in -ing} politely.

We apologize for this {adjective} inconvenience and our {emotion} {job} hotline.
